Interface AlgorithmPlugin<G>

All Superinterfaces:
Plugin
All Known Implementing Classes:
BlockCovarianceEdaAlgorithmPlugin, BmdaAlgorithmPlugin, BoaAlgorithmPlugin, CemAlgorithmPlugin, CgaAlgorithmPlugin, ChowLiuEdaAlgorithmPlugin, CmaEsAlgorithmPlugin, CopulaEdaAlgorithmPlugin, DependencyTreeEdaAlgorithmPlugin, EbnaAlgorithmPlugin, EgnaAlgorithmPlugin, EhbsaAlgorithmPlugin, EhmPermutationAlgorithmPlugin, EmnaAlgorithmPlugin, FactorizedDiscreteEdaAlgorithmPlugin, FlowEdaAlgorithmPlugin, FullCovarianceEdaAlgorithmPlugin, GaussianEdaAlgorithmPlugin, GmmEdaAlgorithmPlugin, HBoaAlgorithmPlugin, IgoAlgorithmPlugin, IndicatorEdaAlgorithmPlugin, KdeEdaAlgorithmPlugin, KendallPermutationEdaAlgorithmPlugin, LowRankCovarianceEdaAlgorithmPlugin, MallowsEdaAlgorithmPlugin, MemoryEdaAlgorithmPlugin, MimicAlgorithmPlugin, MimicContinuousAlgorithmPlugin, MoEdaSkeletonAlgorithmPlugin, MultivariateKedaAlgorithmPlugin, NoisyResamplingEdaAlgorithmPlugin, ParetoEdaAlgorithmPlugin, PbilAlgorithmPlugin, PbilRealAlgorithmPlugin, PlackettLuceEdaAlgorithmPlugin, PositionBasedPermutationEdaAlgorithmPlugin, RandomImmigrantsEdaAlgorithmPlugin, SlidingWindowEdaAlgorithmPlugin, SNesAlgorithmPlugin, SpedaAlgorithmPlugin, TreeEdaAlgorithmPlugin, UmdaAlgorithmPlugin, UmdacAlgorithmPlugin, UmdaContinuousAlgorithmPlugin, UmdadAlgorithmPlugin, UnivariateKedaAlgorithmPlugin, XNesAlgorithmPlugin
public interface AlgorithmPlugin<G> extends Plugin
Plugin factory for algorithms.
